commit.message:
Fix Railway crash: replace ts-node/esm with tsx for Node 22 compatibility

ts-node/esm with --loader flag causes ERR_REQUIRE_CYCLE_MODULE on Node 22.
tsx is a drop-in replacement that works cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: prioritize domain/mDNS for httpUnsafeOrigin; document limitation

CryptPad requires a single static httpUnsafeOrigin. StartOS exposes
services on many addresses simultaneously (public domain, private domain,
mDNS, multiple IPs). Previously we picked the first HTTPS URL which could
return an internal bridge IP (e.g. 10.0.3.1) unreachable from browsers.

Replace the naive URL picker with a 4-step priority chain:
  1. Public domain  (e.g. StartTunnel) — works from any network
  2. Private domain (OS-managed)       — stable LAN/VPN access
  3. mDNS hostname                     — stable LAN access by name
  4. Non-localhost IP                  — best-effort fallback

Update README to accurately describe the single-origin architecture,
the priority selection logic, and what users should expect when accessing
from a non-canonical URL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor data delivery: on-demand airports, queued init, Firestore per cycle

Aircraft + fires:
- fetchAircraft/fetchFIRMS save to Firestore every cycle (aircraft_states,
  fire_hotspots collections) and overwrite cache/aircraft.csv, cache/fires.csv
- On data:init: serve immediately from CSV cache if available, otherwise
  queue socket and flush once next live cycle completes

Airports:
- Purely on-demand: served from cache/airports.csv if it exists,
  otherwise fetchAirports() is called inline before responding
- Removed airports from startup fetch and retry interval

* feat: upgrade menu icons to Imagen 4.0 for thicker, bolder strokes

Regenerated all 4 page menu icons using Imagen 4.0 model instead of
gemini-2.0-flash. Much thicker stroke weight, more professional look
that matches SF Symbols semibold weight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resize icons to 128px with dilated strokes for crisp rendering

Original 648px icons were being scaled 18x down to 18pt display,
making strokes paper-thin. Now 128px with morphological dilation
(MaxFilter 7px) applied before resize for bold, crisp strokes at
the target display size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: replace PNG menu icons with hand-crafted SVGs matching toolbar style

Replaced AI-generated outline PNGs with clean SVG icons using filled paths,
matching the bold filled style of existing toolbar icons (canvas.add_page, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: switch page menu icons to SF Symbols for crisp rendering

Custom SVGs with fill="white" cutouts don't work with iOS template
rendering (all non-transparent pixels become the tint color). Replaced
with SF Symbols which render perfectly at any size: doc.fill.badge.plus,
doc.on.doc.fill, doc.fill.badge.minus, trash.fill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace non-existent doc.fill.badge.minus with xmark.bin.fill

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add undo action to page management popover

Snapshots PDF state before each page mutation. Undo button appears in
the popover only when there's something to undo, restoring the previous
PDF document state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-save page changes to Supabase on document close

Tracks dirty state on page mutations. On dismiss (home button or view
disappear), uploads modified PDF back to Supabase storage via
DocumentService.savePDF and updates the local temp cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Supprimé aussi les retry client (redondants avec le retry serveur).

commit.message:
Initial release: Windows Task Manager MCP server v1.0.0

MCP tools for AI agents to manage Windows processes and ports:
- list_processes: list/filter running processes
- kill_process: kill by PID
- find_process_by_port: find which process uses a TCP port
- kill_process_by_port: single-step kill by port number

Includes CI/CD (GitHub Actions), auto-registration for Claude Code,
and pre-built binary releases for Windows.

refactor: 매직넘버 상수화 + API URL 통합 + 히스토리 헬퍼 추출

서버/클라이언트 양쪽의 하드코딩된 설정값을 상수로 통합하고,
반복 패턴을 공통 유틸로 추출하여 Single Source of Control 원칙 강화

- server/constants/config.ts: 업로드 제한, Rate Limit, 세션, 인증서 경고 상수
- src/constants/api.ts: 프론트엔드 API 엔드포인트 경로 상수 (7개 파일 통합)
- src/constants/retry.ts: 재시도/딜레이 관련 상수 (kpisApiService, supplySubmitService 등)
- src/lib/utils.ts: createHistoryEntry 팩토리 (DataGrid, AutoMatchPanel, CorrectionSuggester 중복 제거)
- src/types/index.ts: GAP_FIELD_LABELS 필드 라벨 단일 소스 (ruleEngine, validationService 통합)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Premium UX redesign: mobile-first, dark/light theme, discovery, curator

Section 1 - Code cleanup: fixed UTF-8 chars, removed C.bg alpha concat issues
Section 2 - Mobile-first: max-width 100vw, padding 16px, no horizontal scroll
Section 3 - Header: 56px sticky, Logo | Balance | Hamburger, blurred backdrop
Section 4 - Navigation: right-side drawer with user info, nav links, theme toggle, logout
Section 5 - Filter UX: horizontal scrollable pills (no-scrollbar), time tabs + category pills
Section 6 - Market cards: removed Predict button (full card clickable), colored left strip, dopamine labels
Section 7 - Trending: scroll-snap carousel with YES/NO side-by-side prices, rank badge, catColor hover
Section 8 - Desktop: 3-col auto-fill grid, first card spans 2 cols as featured
Section 9 - Theme system: CSS vars for dark/light (bg/card/text/border/divider), hex for alpha-compat colors, manual toggle + prefers-color-scheme auto, lib/themeContext.js + data-theme on html
Section 10 - Trading modal: fullscreen-ready on mobile via bottom-sheet auth modal
Section 12 - Performance: skeleton loaders (6 cards while loading), IntersectionObserver infinite scroll
Section 13 - Dopamine UX: TRENDING (fire pulse badge), HOT (lightning), NEW labels; prob bar gradient by confidence; urgent timer highlight
Section 14 - Discovery: section headers with counts, Trending row + active grid with labels
Section 15 - Market Curator: pages/api/curator.js — ensures 15 active markets minimum, 28 templates across 8 categories (Economia, Cripto, Energia, Deportes, Politica, Actualidad, Geopolitica, Clima), shuffle + dedup logic
